title: 你饿了吗？
description_uz: «Qorning ochdimi? Yur, ovqatlanamiz.» — ikki do'stning restoranda buyurtma berishi. Bu dialog ovqat-ichimlik nomlarini aytish, buyurtma berish va miqdor bildirishni o'rgatadi. Tanish mavzu, juda foydali kundalik so'zlar — restoranda kerak bo'ladi. Rol o'ynash va eshitish mashqi uchun mukammal.
description_ru: «Ты голодный? Пойдём поедим.» — двое друзей делают заказ в ресторане. Этот диалог учит называть еду и напитки, делать заказ и указывать количество. Близкая тема, очень полезная повседневная лексика — пригодится в ресторане. Идеально для ролевых игр и тренировки слуха.
description_en: «Are you hungry? Let's go eat.» — two friends placing an order at a restaurant. This dialogue teaches naming food and drinks, ordering, and stating quantities. Familiar topic, highly useful everyday vocabulary—you'll need it at any restaurant. Ideal for role-play and listening practice.

sentences.text_original: 有一点儿。我们去吃饭吧。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yì diǎnr. Wǒ men qù chī fàn ba.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: What do you want to eat?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我想吃米饭和鸡肉。你呢？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng chī mǐ fàn hé jī ròu. Nǐ ne?
sentences.text_translation: Men guruch va tovuq go'shti yemoqchiman. Sen-chi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я хочу рис и курицу. А ты?
sentences.text_translation_en: I want rice and chicken. And you?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我想吃面条，听说这家的面条很好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng chī miàn tiáo, tīng shuō zhè jiā de miàn tiáo hěn hǎo chī.
sentences.text_translation: Men ugra yemoqchiman, eshitishimcha bu yerning ugrasi juda mazali.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я хочу лапшу, говорят, лапша здесь очень вкусная.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want noodles; I heard the noodles here are really good.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yào yì bēi chá. Nǐ ne?
sentences.text_translation: Men bir piyola choy olaman. Sen-chi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я возьму чашку чая. А ты?
sentences.text_translation_en: I'll have a cup of tea. And you?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: I'll have a glass of water.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Fú wù yuán, wǒ men yào diǎn cài.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, nǐ men yào shén me?
sentences.speaker: C

sentences.text_original: 我要一碗面条和一杯茶。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yào yì wǎn miàn tiáo hé yì bēi chá.
sentences.text_translation: Men bir kosa ugra va bir piyola choy olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я возьму миску лапши и чашку чая.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'll have a bowl of noodles and a cup of tea.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我要一碗米饭、一份鸡肉和一杯水。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yào yì wǎn mǐ fàn, yí fèn jī ròu hé yì bēi shuǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Men bir kosa guruch, bir porsiya tovuq go'shti va bir stakan suv olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я возьму миску риса, порцию курицы и стакан воды.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'll have a bowl of rice, a portion of chicken, and a glass of water.
sentences.speaker: B
